title: Warden Garden
description: This texture pack gives a Sculk look to Pale Garden
body:
Warden Garden is a Minecraft resource pack that gives the "Pale Garden" biome a complete visual overhaul inspired by the deep, mysterious aesthetic of Sculk-themed blocks. This pack transforms the environment to feel more eerie, ancient, and alive with darkness—ideal for players who want to create otherworldly builds or immerse themselves in a deep, corrupted garden ambiance.

Features:
- Replaces all Pale Garden textures with custom Sculk-themed designs.
- Includes glowing emissive textures for specific blocks to enhance atmosphere in low light.
- Compatible with vanilla Minecraft – no mods required.
- Optional: For best visual experience, it's recommended to use OptiFine or an equivalent mod to enable block glow effects in darkness (via emissive textures).
  
This pack focuses solely on textures. It does not modify sounds, models, or animations. It works in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments, and supports versions 1.20+ (including snapshots and minor updates).
